narrative.description: An immigration officer in a fictional dystopian state inspects entry documents, balances a meager salary against family needs, and faces moral choices when rules conflict with humanity.
narrative.core_loop: Review traveler documents against daily rule changes, stamp approve or deny, earn salary, pay rent and heat, and manage family health while uncovering story branches through border decisions.

mechanics.map_notes: In Papers, Please, approve or deny paperwork by cross-checking rules under time and moral pressure.
mechanics.expression: In Papers, Please, approve or deny paperwork by cross-checking rules under time and moral pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: In Papers, Please, conversation branches alter relationships, story flags, and available quests.
mechanics.expression: In Papers, Please, conversation branches alter relationships, story flags, and available quests.

mechanics.map_notes: In Papers, Please, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Papers, Please, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Papers, Please through its core simulation loop.
